target.target_description: Need agent orchestration, retrieval, evaluation, tracing, and strong project storytelling.

profile_summary: - Education: Zhejiang University, Computer Science and Technology
- Focus Areas: agent, RAG, retrieval, evaluation, tracing, WebWorker

- Project 1: Interview Copilot | An interview assistant project focused on project-aware interview flow, preparation workflow, and a review-to-drill learning loop, built around agent runtime and retrieval capabilities. | Ownership: Built the nanobot runtime integration, project-aware interview loop, prep workflow, and review-to-drill loop. | Tech: Python, agent runtime, RAG, retrieval, evaluation, tracing | Deep Dive: runtime orchestration, question routing, memory boundary, trace schema, review policy

- Project 2: CuteGo | A browser-side Go-related application centered on integrating inference into the frontend while keeping the UI responsive. | Ownership: Built browser-side inference integration and the UI responsiveness strategy. | Tech: TypeScript, React, WebWorker, KataGo | Deep Dive: worker isolation, main-thread responsiveness, model integration
project_priorities: - Interview Copilot: ownership: Built the nanobot runtime integration, project-aware interview loop, prep workflow, and review-to-drill loop. | deep dive: runtime orchestration, question routing, memory boundary
- CuteGo: ownership: Built browser-side inference integration and the UI responsiveness strategy. | deep dive: worker isolation, main-thread responsiveness, model integration
target_gap_analysis: - Target role is likely to emphasize: agent, retrieval, evaluation, orchestration.
- Already visible in your profile: agent, retrieval, evaluation, orchestration.
- Your current profile already overlaps well with the target role. Focus on delivery and evidence density.
evidence_gaps: - Prepare 2-3 concrete metrics: latency, accuracy, throughput, adoption, or iteration speed.
training_plan: - 1. Rewrite your 90-second self-introduction for ByteDance, AI Agent Intern, agent.
- 2. Build a 3-minute deep-dive story for Interview Copilot.
- 3. Prepare concrete evidence for ownership, trade-offs, failure handling, and outcomes.
- 4. Drill the seed questions below until each answer can be delivered in 1-2 minutes.
- 5. Run a focused mock interview starting from the 开场介绍 stage.
seed_questions: - 介绍一下WebWorker在AI前端应用中的使用场景
